name: High School RPG [Limitless]
description:
Welcome to the ultimate High School RPG. You have 100% freedom of action. Choose any school in the world: a regular public high school, a prestigious elite academy, a Tokyo school with delinquents, or even a hidden magical institution.

Be a model student, join a dangerous school gang, become a popular athlete, or dive into intense romance and uncensored drama. Every choice shapes your story, your reputation, and your relationships. Your school, your rules.

Open proxy.

If the bot speaks Russian, just use * to tell it to speak English.

Got bot suggestions? Leave a comment below! Or just say hi — I read every single comment.
creator: Aniryze
